randomEvents.title: Widow's Flour-Sack Trail
randomEvents.text: A ripped flour sack leaves pale prints through the alley behind the mill.

randomEvents.title: Beggar With a Noble Ring
randomEvents.text: A beggar offers a signet ring in exchange for one night of silence.

randomEvents.title: Cat in the Bell Rope
randomEvents.text: A frightened cat climbs into the chapel bell rope before curfew.

randomEvents.title: Knife Game Behind the Tavern
randomEvents.text: Local toughs play for fingers, secrets, and small debts.

randomEvents.title: Rain on a Single Door
randomEvents.text: One townhouse is soaked by rain falling from a cloudless sky.

randomEvents.title: The Laughing Stocks
randomEvents.text: The punishment stocks laugh using the voices of people locked there last year.

randomEvents.title: Child Counting Chimneys
randomEvents.text: A child counts chimneys and insists one more appears each dusk.

randomEvents.title: The Butcher's Honest Scale
randomEvents.text: The butcher's scale weighs guilt instead of meat.

randomEvents.title: Lost Heirloom Button
randomEvents.text: A silver button with the family mark appears in a gutter.

randomEvents.title: Ale That Shows Tomorrow
randomEvents.text: One tavern barrel shows tomorrow's face in its foam.

randomEvents.title: The Mayor's Locked Smile
randomEvents.text: The mayor smiles through a curse and begs with his eyes.

randomEvents.title: Mourning Clothes on Festival Day
randomEvents.text: A tailor sells mourning clothes to people who are not dead yet.

randomEvents.title: The Clock That Skips Your Hour
randomEvents.text: The town clock skips the heir's birth hour and the crowd notices.

randomEvents.title: Lanterns in the Briars
randomEvents.text: Small lanterns glow inside brambles where no hand can reach.

randomEvents.title: Oak With a Door-Knocker
randomEvents.text: An oak tree bears a brass knocker warm to the touch.

randomEvents.title: Deer Wearing Wedding Lace
randomEvents.text: A deer runs past in a torn veil and refuses to bleed.

randomEvents.title: The Silent Woodcutters
randomEvents.text: Woodcutters swing axes in perfect silence and never strike bark.

randomEvents.title: Crow Funeral
randomEvents.text: Crows bury a tiny crown under wet leaves.

randomEvents.title: Bark Mask on the Path
randomEvents.text: A bark mask lies face up and whispers the heir's surname.

randomEvents.title: Hunter's Arrow Returns
randomEvents.text: An arrow lands at the heir's feet with their name carved into it.

randomEvents.title: Grandmother Root
randomEvents.text: A root shaped like a hand grips a child's doll.

randomEvents.title: The Orchard Counts Back
randomEvents.text: Every apple tree is numbered, but the numbers count down to one.

randomEvents.title: Birdsong in a Dead Tongue
randomEvents.text: Birdsong forms clear words if the heir knows old prayers.

randomEvents.title: The Green Tax Collector
randomEvents.text: A moss-cloaked figure presents a bill for every branch broken.

randomEvents.title: Sleeping Bear with Human Dreams
randomEvents.text: A bear mutters legal testimony while sleeping.

randomEvents.title: The Tree That Asks Permission
randomEvents.text: A fallen tree asks politely before crushing the road behind the heir.

randomEvents.title: Dripping Stone Names
randomEvents.text: Water drops spell names on the cave floor before vanishing.

randomEvents.title: Miner's Candle Refuses Death
randomEvents.text: A candle burns underwater and points deeper into the mine.

randomEvents.title: Glass Bat Swarm
randomEvents.text: Transparent bats flash stolen memories through their wings.

randomEvents.title: Blind Fish in a Puddle
randomEvents.text: Blind fish swim in a boot-deep puddle and carry gold flakes.

randomEvents.title: Old Pickaxe in Fresh Stone
randomEvents.text: A rusted pickaxe is embedded in stone formed this morning.

randomEvents.title: Mine-Gas Hymn
randomEvents.text: Gas vents hum the local funeral hymn on the wrong notes.

randomEvents.title: Cave Pearl in a Skull
randomEvents.text: A pearl grows inside a skull wearing miner's teeth.

randomEvents.title: The Second Footfall
randomEvents.text: Every step echoes twice, then three times, then follows.

randomEvents.title: Iron Door Without Hinges
randomEvents.text: A door of iron has no hinges and breathes warm air.

randomEvents.title: The Kindly Collapse
randomEvents.text: A collapse seals danger away but traps a crying stranger.

randomEvents.title: Old Dwarf Lottery
randomEvents.text: Carved stones invite the heir to gamble blood for ore.

randomEvents.title: Waterfall Falling Up
randomEvents.text: An underground waterfall runs upward into a black crack.

randomEvents.title: Tunnel Drawn on Skin
randomEvents.text: Dust reveals a tunnel diagram on the heir's arm.

randomEvents.title: Goat with a Crown of Ice
randomEvents.text: A mountain goat wears a crown of ice and kneels to no one.

randomEvents.title: Avalanche Bell
randomEvents.text: A buried bell rings once before the slope decides to fall.

randomEvents.title: Pilgrim Frozen Praying
randomEvents.text: A frozen pilgrim opens one eye and asks the date.

randomEvents.title: Thin-Air Confession
randomEvents.text: At altitude, the heir speaks a secret they never meant to reveal.

randomEvents.title: Snow Footprints Going Upward
randomEvents.text: Footprints climb vertically up a cliff face.

randomEvents.title: Hermit Selling Thunder
randomEvents.text: A hermit sells bottled thunder and refuses gold.

randomEvents.title: Stone Ram Challenges Passage
randomEvents.text: A stone ram blocks the path until beaten or praised.

randomEvents.title: Ice Mirror Overhang
randomEvents.text: An overhang reflects events from a future fall.

randomEvents.title: Prayer Flags Strangle Wind
randomEvents.text: Prayer flags snap around the wind and choke it still.

randomEvents.title: Cliffside Court
randomEvents.text: Tiny judges carved into the cliff demand a trial.

randomEvents.title: Frostbitten Letter
randomEvents.text: A letter frozen to stone addresses the heir by generation number.

randomEvents.title: The Sleeping Avalanche
randomEvents.text: A snowfield snores and must not be woken.

randomEvents.title: The Saint's Last Breath
randomEvents.text: A cave exhales warm air once per year; today is the day.

randomEvents.title: Cell Door Open Inward
randomEvents.text: A cell door opens inward though the lock is outside.

randomEvents.title: Chains Learning Names
randomEvents.text: Chains scrape the floor and practice the heir's name.

randomEvents.title: Gaoler's Lunch Still Warm
randomEvents.text: A gaoler's lunch sits warm beside bones centuries old.

randomEvents.title: The Friendly Rack
randomEvents.text: A torture rack politely offers advice about posture.

randomEvents.title: Black Key in White Ash
randomEvents.text: A black key lies in a pile of white ash shaped like a hand.

randomEvents.title: The Courtroom Cell
randomEvents.text: A cell contains a judge's bench and one guilty chair.

randomEvents.title: The Map That Punishes Lies
randomEvents.text: A dungeon map burns every false statement spoken over it.

randomEvents.title: Prayer Etched Upside Down
randomEvents.text: A prayer is etched upside down on the ceiling above a pit.

randomEvents.title: The False Exit
randomEvents.text: An exit door opens onto yesterday's corridor.

randomEvents.title: Dice Made of Knuckles
randomEvents.text: Bone dice roll themselves and demand a wager.

randomEvents.title: The Clean Cell
randomEvents.text: One immaculate cell has flowers and a fresh noose.

randomEvents.title: Chalk Mark from Tomorrow
randomEvents.text: A chalk arrow appears where the heir will flee later.

randomEvents.title: Pardon Written in Blood
randomEvents.text: A pardon signed in blood waits for an unnamed prisoner.

randomEvents.title: Bottle with a Still-Beating Heart
randomEvents.text: A bottle washes ashore with a tiny heart beating inside.

randomEvents.title: Net Full of Teeth
randomEvents.text: A fishing net comes up full of human teeth, sorted by size.

randomEvents.title: Lighthouse Blinks Twice
randomEvents.text: The lighthouse blinks like an eye when the heir approaches.

randomEvents.title: Pearls in a Dead Gull
randomEvents.text: A dead gull's crop is full of black pearls.

randomEvents.title: Harbor Bell Underwater
randomEvents.text: The harbor bell rings from below the pier.

randomEvents.title: Crab Wearing a Wedding Ring
randomEvents.text: A crab brandishes a wedding ring and refuses to let go.

randomEvents.title: Ship Without a Wake
randomEvents.text: A ship crosses the bay without leaving a wake or shadow.

randomEvents.title: Anchor in the Market Square
randomEvents.text: An anchor appears in the square dripping seaweed.

randomEvents.title: The Mermaid's Tax Notice
randomEvents.text: A tax notice from a mermaid court is nailed to the dock.

randomEvents.title: Sea Glass Eye
randomEvents.text: A sea-glass eye shows reefs that are not on any chart.

randomEvents.title: The Widow's Dry Boat
randomEvents.text: A widow's boat returns dry after sinking last year.

randomEvents.title: Kelp Around the Bedpost
randomEvents.text: Kelp wraps a sailor's bedpost three streets from shore.

randomEvents.title: The Last Fish in the Barrel
randomEvents.text: The last fish in a barrel begs not to be eaten.

randomEvents.title: Lantern in Black Reeds
randomEvents.text: A lantern drifts through black reeds without hand or boat.

randomEvents.title: Leech with a Gold Tooth
randomEvents.text: A leech smiles with a gold tooth and offers directions.

randomEvents.title: Bog Body Opens Eyes
randomEvents.text: A bog body opens its eyes when the heir lies.

randomEvents.title: The Reed Harp
randomEvents.text: Wind through reeds plays a song that charms boots off feet.

randomEvents.title: Mud Prints Ahead
randomEvents.text: The heir's own footprints appear ahead in fresh mud.

randomEvents.title: Croaking Jury
randomEvents.text: Frogs gather in a circle and croak like judges.

randomEvents.title: Blackwater Reflection Missing
randomEvents.text: The heir's reflection is missing from still blackwater.

randomEvents.title: Leechwife's Free Cure
randomEvents.text: A leechwife offers a cure but asks for a memory.

randomEvents.title: Drowned Road Marker
randomEvents.text: A road marker stands knee-deep in water, pointing down.

randomEvents.title: Serpent Wearing Prayer Beads
randomEvents.text: A black serpent coils with prayer beads around its neck.

randomEvents.title: Mire Wedding Procession
randomEvents.text: A wedding procession crosses the mire with no footprints.

randomEvents.title: Reed Witch's Teacup
randomEvents.text: A teacup floats by with tea still steaming.

randomEvents.title: The Dry Island
randomEvents.text: A dry island appears only when someone gives up hope.

randomEvents.title: Milestone with Fresh Blood
randomEvents.text: A milestone bleeds from the carved distance number.

randomEvents.title: Cart Wheel Turning Alone
randomEvents.text: A broken cart wheel turns beside the road without wind.

randomEvents.title: Pilgrim Who Casts Two Shadows
randomEvents.text: A pilgrim casts one shadow forward and one back.

randomEvents.title: Bridge That Asks Names
randomEvents.text: A bridge asks travelers for their names before bearing weight.

randomEvents.title: Inn Sign Changed Overnight
randomEvents.text: An inn sign changes names while no one looks.

randomEvents.title: Crow on the Waystone
randomEvents.text: A crow on a waystone repeats the heir's last thought.

randomEvents.title: The Beggar's Map Scar
randomEvents.text: A beggar reveals a map scarred into his back.

randomEvents.title: Roadside Soup for the Dead
randomEvents.text: A roadside pot serves soup only to ghosts.

randomEvents.title: Royal Courier's Empty Satchel
randomEvents.text: A royal courier arrives with an empty satchel and a slit throat.

randomEvents.title: The Milestone Counts Down
randomEvents.text: Every mile marker counts down toward the heir's family estate.

randomEvents.title: Dust Devil with a Voice
randomEvents.text: A dust devil asks which heir died last.

randomEvents.title: Three Roads, Two Choices
randomEvents.text: The road forks into three paths, but only two have shadows.

randomEvents.title: Puddle Reflects a Battlefield
randomEvents.text: A puddle reflects a battlefield instead of the sky.

randomEvents.title: Statue Missing Its Apology
randomEvents.text: A statue has its mouth chiseled away and still tries to apologize.

randomEvents.title: Fountain Running with Dust
randomEvents.text: A fountain sprays dust in perfect arcs.

randomEvents.title: Doorframe Without Wall
randomEvents.text: A doorframe stands alone and opens into a furnished room.

randomEvents.title: Crown Rust in a Cradle
randomEvents.text: Rust shaped like a crown fills a stone cradle.

randomEvents.title: Broken Sundial at Midnight
randomEvents.text: A broken sundial casts a shadow at midnight.

randomEvents.title: The Librarian's Ashes
randomEvents.text: Ashes in a jar correct the heir's pronunciation.

randomEvents.title: Painted Door Bleeding Paint
randomEvents.text: A painted door leaks wet paint like blood.

randomEvents.title: The Architect's Final Nail
randomEvents.text: A golden nail holds an entire wall upright.

randomEvents.title: Mourner in a Window
randomEvents.text: A mourner appears in every intact window, always facing away.

randomEvents.title: Royal Cradle Song
randomEvents.text: A cradle song hums from the collapsed nursery.

randomEvents.title: Guard Statue Asks Password
randomEvents.text: A guard statue asks for a password outlawed generations ago.

randomEvents.title: The Map Room Flooded with Stars
randomEvents.text: A map room is flooded with reflected stars though roofless at noon.

randomEvents.title: Bell Tower Below Ground
randomEvents.text: A buried bell tower rings whenever someone steps over it.

randomEvents.title: Grave-Moth Halo
randomEvents.text: Grave-moths form a halo over one unmarked grave.

randomEvents.title: Bone Dice in the Offering Bowl
randomEvents.text: Bone dice roll in the offering bowl and show a skull.

randomEvents.title: Ancestor Coughs in the Wall
randomEvents.text: An ancestor coughs politely from inside the wall.

randomEvents.title: Ossuary Choir Tuning
randomEvents.text: Skulls hum scales before anyone enters the ossuary.

randomEvents.title: The Wrong Epitaph
randomEvents.text: A grave bears the heir's name with tomorrow's date.

randomEvents.title: Bell Rope Made of Hair
randomEvents.text: The crypt bell rope is braided from hair matching the heir's family.

randomEvents.title: The Coffin That Apologizes
randomEvents.text: A coffin apologizes for what is inside.

randomEvents.title: Prayer Book Chews Pages
randomEvents.text: A prayer book chews its own pages when opened.

randomEvents.title: Black Candle, White Flame
randomEvents.text: A black candle burns with a white flame and casts no light.

randomEvents.title: Sarcophagus Breathes Perfume
randomEvents.text: A sarcophagus breathes perfume and rot in alternating sighs.

randomEvents.title: The Family Niche Opens
randomEvents.text: A sealed family niche opens when the heir speaks their surname.

randomEvents.title: Marble Angel Drops Feather
randomEvents.text: A marble angel drops a real feather into the dust.

randomEvents.title: Last Will in Bone Script
randomEvents.text: A last will is written in bone script across the ceiling.

secretEvents.title: Well Water Tastes of Iron
secretEvents.text: The public well stains cups red, but only after strangers drink.

secretEvents.title: Blind Cobbler's Warning
secretEvents.text: A blind cobbler recognizes the heir by footstep and warns of a debt.

secretEvents.title: Choir Practice in Empty Chapel
secretEvents.text: The chapel choir sings perfectly though no one is inside.

secretEvents.title: A Rat Wearing a Medal
secretEvents.text: A rat drags a military medal through the street as if on parade.

secretEvents.title: Poacher's Snare Map
secretEvents.text: A dead poacher's skin is tattooed with a useful snare map.

secretEvents.title: Fox Demands a Toll
secretEvents.text: A fox blocks the trail and demands a joke, coin, or tooth.

secretEvents.title: Wolf Tracks Around Camp
secretEvents.text: Wolf tracks circle the camp from the inside outward.

secretEvents.title: The Fiddle in the Hollow
secretEvents.text: A fiddle plays beneath a hollow log; dancers have no shadows.

secretEvents.title: Echo Counts Your Bones
secretEvents.text: An echo answers with a number higher than the heir's bones.

secretEvents.title: Map Scratched by Fingernails
secretEvents.text: A wall map is scratched by fingernails from the other side.

secretEvents.title: The Lost Canary Speaks
secretEvents.text: A dead canary gives one warning in a miner's voice.

secretEvents.title: The Lode That Bleeds
secretEvents.text: A silver lode bleeds when struck with steel.

secretEvents.title: Eagle Drops a Key
secretEvents.text: A great eagle drops a warm key into the snow.

secretEvents.title: The Blue-Lipped Shrine
secretEvents.text: A shrine answers prayers by stealing heat from the petitioner.

secretEvents.title: Summit Soup Pot
secretEvents.text: A soup pot simmers unattended on a peak no cook could reach.

secretEvents.title: Peak Shadow at Noon
secretEvents.text: A peak casts a shadow at noon toward the wrong kingdom.

secretEvents.title: Rune That Counts Wounds
secretEvents.text: A rune glows brighter for every scar the heir carries.

secretEvents.title: Iron Maiden Humming
secretEvents.text: An iron maiden hums a lullaby to a hidden child.

secretEvents.title: Jailer's Shadow Still Patrols
secretEvents.text: A shadow patrols with keys that unlock memories.

secretEvents.title: The Hungry Portcullis
secretEvents.text: A portcullis drops only when someone lies underneath.

secretEvents.title: Drowned Sailor Buys Ale
secretEvents.text: A drowned sailor pays with wet coins and asks for directions home.

secretEvents.title: Song from the Fogbank
secretEvents.text: A fogbank sings the heir's childhood lullaby.

secretEvents.title: Fishmarket Prophet
secretEvents.text: A fishmonger predicts death by arranging cod heads.

secretEvents.title: Moon-Tide Duel
secretEvents.text: Two tide pools duel by throwing reflections at one another.

secretEvents.title: Fever-Flies Spell Help
secretEvents.text: Fever-flies swarm into letters spelling help over the water.

secretEvents.title: Heron Carrying a Knife
secretEvents.text: A white heron flies overhead carrying a butcher knife.

secretEvents.title: Bog Oak Baby Rattle
secretEvents.text: A baby rattle made of bog oak rattles by itself.

secretEvents.title: Mosquitoes Avoid One Corpse
secretEvents.text: Mosquitoes avoid one corpse floating face-down.

secretEvents.title: Bandit's Polite Toll
secretEvents.text: A bandit politely asks for a story instead of coin.

secretEvents.title: Funeral Cart Going Fast
secretEvents.text: A funeral cart races by with no driver and no horse.

secretEvents.title: The Same Tree Again
secretEvents.text: The same lightning-struck tree appears after every bend.

secretEvents.title: Lantern Cart at Dawn
secretEvents.text: A lantern cart rolls by at dawn, though lantern carts run at night.

secretEvents.title: Mosaic Eye Follows Heir
secretEvents.text: One mosaic eye follows the heir between broken rooms.

secretEvents.title: Steps Descending Upward
secretEvents.text: A stairway descends upward when viewed from the side.

secretEvents.title: Coin Minted Tomorrow
secretEvents.text: A coin minted next year lies under rubble.

secretEvents.title: Throne Without a Seat
secretEvents.text: A throne has arms, back, and crown, but no place to sit.

secretEvents.title: Fresh Flowers on Old Dust
secretEvents.text: Fresh flowers lie on dust no living foot has disturbed.

secretEvents.title: Mourner Without a Face
secretEvents.text: A faceless mourner kneels where no burial is scheduled.

secretEvents.title: The Ossuary Keyhole
secretEvents.text: A keyhole appears in a skull's forehead.

secretEvents.title: Mourning Veil in the Drain
secretEvents.text: A black veil crawls from the drainage channel.

uniqueEvents.title: The Tax Candle Burns Black
uniqueEvents.text: A tax office candle burns black whenever a false account is read.

uniqueEvents.title: Duel at Market Noon
uniqueEvents.text: Two apprentices demand the heir witness a duel over a forged love letter.

uniqueEvents.title: The Scribe Who Forgot His Name
uniqueEvents.text: A guild scribe forgets his name but remembers every unpaid contract.

uniqueEvents.title: Mushrooms in a Perfect Spiral
uniqueEvents.text: Mooncaps form a spiral that tightens when watched.

uniqueEvents.title: Sap That Smells of Wine
uniqueEvents.text: Red sap drips from a wounded tree and makes animals drunk.

uniqueEvents.title: Mirror Pool Under Ferns
uniqueEvents.text: A hidden pool reflects the heir as an older generation.

uniqueEvents.title: The Rope Pulled Downward
uniqueEvents.text: A climbing rope tugs as if someone below is begging.

uniqueEvents.title: Salt Vein Shaped Like a Spine
uniqueEvents.text: A salt vein curves like a giant spine through the wall.

uniqueEvents.title: Torchlight Goes Blue
uniqueEvents.text: Torches turn blue near an invisible drop.

uniqueEvents.title: Bridge of Three Ropes
uniqueEvents.text: A rope bridge has three ropes; one is made of hair.

uniqueEvents.title: Harpies Mimic Family Voices
uniqueEvents.text: Harpies call from the clouds using dead relatives' voices.

uniqueEvents.title: The Sled with No Driver
uniqueEvents.text: A loaded sled races downhill with no driver and fresh blood.

uniqueEvents.title: Prisoner Behind Fresh Mortar
uniqueEvents.text: A voice speaks from behind mortar still wet.

uniqueEvents.title: Bread Slot with Teeth
uniqueEvents.text: A bread slot snaps shut with wet teeth.

uniqueEvents.title: Well of Confiscated Names
uniqueEvents.text: The prison well echoes names confiscated from inmates.

uniqueEvents.title: Tide Leaves a Door
uniqueEvents.text: Low tide reveals a barn door standing upright in the mud.

uniqueEvents.title: Salt That Crawls
uniqueEvents.text: A line of salt crawls inland like white ants.

uniqueEvents.title: The Storm Buys Rope
uniqueEvents.text: A storm speaks through a sailmaker and buys rope.

uniqueEvents.title: Moss-Covered Cradle
uniqueEvents.text: A cradle floats by, rocking though empty.

uniqueEvents.title: The Sinking Shrine
uniqueEvents.text: A shrine sinks one inch whenever someone prays falsely.

uniqueEvents.title: The Fog Keeps Receipts
uniqueEvents.text: Fog forms paper receipts for old sins.

uniqueEvents.title: Shoes Facing West
uniqueEvents.text: A line of abandoned shoes faces west in perfect order.

uniqueEvents.title: Tollkeeper Counting Fingers
uniqueEvents.text: A tollkeeper counts fingers, not coins.

uniqueEvents.title: Horse Refuses a Shadow
uniqueEvents.text: A horse refuses to step into one patch of road-shadow.

uniqueEvents.title: Banner That Remembers Wind
uniqueEvents.text: A torn banner snaps in a wind that died centuries ago.

uniqueEvents.title: Table Set for Dead Kings
uniqueEvents.text: A banquet table is set for kings whose names are scratched out.

uniqueEvents.title: The Law That Bites
uniqueEvents.text: A stone law-tablet bites anyone who reads it aloud.

uniqueEvents.title: Coffin Nail Warm to Touch
uniqueEvents.text: One coffin nail is warm and beats like a pulse.

uniqueEvents.title: Wax Saint Weeping Gold
uniqueEvents.text: A wax saint weeps gold that hardens into teeth.

uniqueEvents.title: Dead Child's Chalk Game
uniqueEvents.text: A chalk game on the floor changes rules between turns.
